title: The Core Technical Components of a Blockchain
description: A visual breakdown of the fundamental technical elements that define a blockchain system and how they interconnect.
relationships: A Peer-to-Peer Network maintains a copy of the Distributed Ledger
Each Block contains a Header with a Hash of the previous block, creating a chain
The Consensus Mechanism is used by network nodes to validate new Blocks
Digital Signatures cryptographically prove ownership and authorize transactions
Cryptographic Hashes ensure data integrity and immutability
